name: Blank-Laborer
feature_desc: Nobles ignore you as furniture. Move through noble districts unnoticed.

name: Archon-Noble
feature_desc: You may call upon the authority of your noble house. Guards and officials of the Archonate grant you audience and minimal deference, provided you do not openly defy them.

name: Cult-Recruit
equipment: Ritual robes, a bone-handled knife, 2 GP
feature_desc: You know the secret signs and meeting places of your cult. You can always find a safe house or a fellow cultist in any settlement, though trust is fickle.

name: Inquisitor-Cadet
equipment: Leather armor, hooded cloak, iron badge, 10 GP
feature_desc: Your Inquisitor-Cadet badge grants you limited authority. You may detain commoners for questioning and enter most public buildings without hindrance.

name: Sump-Runner
equipment: Dark clothes, crowbar, a coil of rope, 10 SP
feature_desc: You know the hidden tunnels, sewers, and forgotten waterways beneath the city. You can navigate these areas with ease and avoid common hazards.

name: House-Retainer
languages: Common, one other of your choice
equipment: Servant's uniform, a set of keys, a locket with a family crest, 5 SP
feature_desc: Your position allows you to overhear private conversations. You have advantage on Insight checks to detect lies or hidden motives in social situations involving your employer's household.

name: Core-Thief-Apprentice
equipment: Dark leather apron, lockpicks, a cracked glow-crystal, 2 GP
feature_desc: You can sense the faint magical residue left on objects that have been enchanted or used in rituals. This allows you to identify valuable or dangerous magical items at a touch.

name: Ash-Walker-Outcast
equipment: Tattered cloak, gas mask, a pouch of ash, 5 CP
feature_desc: You are inured to the toxic ash and fumes of the wastelands. You have resistance to poison damage and advantage on saving throws against inhaling harmful substances.
